branch.frontier_task_title: Implement actor skill packet writer and fixtures
branch.branch_summary: Start TASK-050 by implementing the actor skill packet writer and fixtures so the TASK-049 contract can be produced as a canonical runtime artifact with source_task_id and source_parent_session_id provenance.

tree_answer.where_are_we: TASK-050 sits on v5.0 after shipped v4.0.
tree_answer.why_this_branch: Implement v5.0 Skillful Actor Runtime: turn skills, capabilities, resources, policies, and metrics into live actor assignment and council-reviewed workforce judgment while preserving the Human Recognition Interface as the operator surface.
tree_answer.what_branch_comes_next: Start TASK-050: Implement actor skill packet writer and fixtures
